name: Lemon Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Blend pie crust mix, the 1/4 cup of sugar, and 1 egg in a medium-size bowl with a pastry blender.
3. Pat dough gently into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
4. Bake in a moderate (350 degree) oven for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and place on a wire rack.
5. Beat the remaining 3 eggs and 1 cup sugar in a medium-size bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add lemon rind, juice, and flour; mix well.
6. Pour the mixture over the pie crust and return to oven. Bake for 15 minutes longer.
7. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar in a medium-size bowl with an electric mixer until frothy. Gradually beat in remaining 3 tablespoons sugar until meringue forms stiff peaks.
8. Remove pan from oven. Increase temperature to very hot (450 degrees).
9. Spread meringue over the lemon mixture.
10. Return to oven and bake for 5 more minutes or until meringue peaks are golden brown. Cool on wire rack.
11. Cut into bars with a wet knife.
